data.title: demo: Queues — hello world producer/consumer
data.description:
## Goal

Educational hello-world demo for Cloudflare Queues (producer + consumer).

## What to implement

* `POST /enqueue` sends a message to the queue
* Consumer handler logs/processes messages in batch
* Dead letter queue configured
* `wrangler.jsonc` with queue producer + consumer bindings

## Verify

```sh
curl -X POST https://<worker>.workers.dev/enqueue -d '{"msg":"hello world"}'
# Check Workers logs for consumer output
```

## Repo

`skogai/cloudflare` — folder: `demos/queues-hello`
